title: Department Manager Vacancy at Barista Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Barista Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Barista Global Group in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Barista Global Group:
Barista Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barista Global Group!
